regional_cost_note: Painters in Christchurch typically charge $35–$60/hr. Post-earthquake, many Canterbury painters have strong experience in plaster repair and weathertight work alongside standard repaints.

businesses.name: David Robertson Decorators Ltd
businesses.known_for: Exceptional residential painting and plastering; NZ Master Painters guarantee; noted in NZ House of the Year judging.

businesses.name: P&D Painters Ltd
businesses.known_for: 140 years of combined experience across a ten-person team; thorough surface preparation and long-lasting finishes.

businesses.name: Newman Decorators
businesses.known_for: Led by Lindsay Newman with 35+ years experience; registered Master Painters and NZ House of the Year award entrant.

businesses.name: Canterbury Painters
businesses.known_for: Local painters specialising in exterior repaints, weathertight repairs, and commercial repaint projects.

businesses.name: Christchurch Master Painters
businesses.known_for: Registered Master Painters; interior and exterior residential and light commercial work across greater Christchurch.
